description: If comfort is on your mind, the Arnold sandals from skechers transport you to heavenly bliss! Stylish and super comfy, this pair is ruggedly crafted for casual wear. Team it with jeans or shorts and step out in style. Upper · Leather upper for rugged feel and style · Over-the-foot straps for added comfort · Back strap to hold the foot firmly in place · Contrast thread detailing for added structure and style · Brand tab appliqued on the front · Well cushioned footbed for all-day comfort · Fabric lining for soft touch and protection from blisters Midsole EVA midsole for long-term durability and protection of feet against impact Outsole Rubber outsole provides durable traction on a variety of surfaces Flex grooves for ease of movement Lugs in the forefoot and heel region for better traction shoe care Use a leather brush to remove dirt Use a branded leather conditioner Do not store in direct sunlight
